description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and a per-branch cache keyed by ${CI_PROJECT_PATH_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} storing vendor/. Define stages build and deploy. In the build stage add a build-master job that runs a before_script to log in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, then executes: docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/app:rw" --workdir "/app" composer:latest sh -c "composer install"; docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE"/php -f - . < ./docker/php/Dockerfile; docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE"/php; docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE"/nginx -f - . < ./docker/nginx/Dockerfile; docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE"/nginx; and only runs on the master branch. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that uses the alpine:latest image, runs apk update and apk add openssh-client, writes $PROD_SSH_KEY to a file named key with mode 0600, and SSHes to evkon@collabatube.com to execute "cd /srv/deploy && make api-deploy", runs only on master except when the commit message matches /skip-deploy/, and sets the production environment with URL https://collabatube.com/.
